issue.message: The id "container_side" in layout "activity_details" is missing from the following layout configurations: layout (present in layout-w600dp-land)
The id "textView_title" in layout "activity_main" is missing from the following layout configurations: layout (present in layout-w600dp-land)
The id "button_order" in layout "activity_manga_list" is missing from the following layout configurations: layout-w600dp-land (present in layout)
The id "container_side" in layout "activity_manga_list" is missing from the following layout configurations: layout (present in layout-w600dp-land)
The id "container_filter_header" in layout "activity_manga_list" is missing from the following layout configurations: layout-w600dp-land (present in layout)
The id "button_timer" in layout "activity_reader" is missing from the following layout configurations: layout-w600dp-land (present in layout)
The id "container_master" in layout "activity_settings" is missing from the following layout configurations: layout (present in layout-w600dp-land)

For locale "cs" (Czech) the following quantity should also be defined: `many` (e.g. "10.0 dne")
For locale "lt" (Lithuanian) the following quantity should also be defined: `many` (e.g. "1.1 obuolio")

"Bem vindo" is a common misspelling; did you mean "Bem-vindo"?
Repeated word "ayrı" in message: possible typo
issue.errorLine1: <string name="downloads_settings_info">Sunucu taraflı engelleme ile ilgili sorun yaşıyorsanız, kaynak ayarlarında her manga kaynağı için ayrı ayrı indirme yavaşlatmayı etkinleştirebilirsiniz</string>

issue.message: Repeated word "ayrı" in message: possible typo
issue.errorLine1: <string name="split_by_translations_summary">Farklı çevirilere sahip bölümleri tek bir liste yerine ayrı ayrı göster</string>

issue.message: "Addresse" is a common misspelling; did you mean "Adresse"?

Formatting %d followed by words ("seconds"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
issue.errorLine1: <string name="page_switch_timer">The page will switch every ~%d seconds</string>

issue.message: Formatting string '`migrate_confirmation`' is not referencing numbered arguments [1]
issue.errorLine1: <string name="migrate_confirmation">「%2$s」から「%3$s」を「%4$s」に置き換えられます</string>

issue.message: The language `as (Assamese)` is present in this project, but not declared in the `localeConfig` resource
The language `ckb` is present in this project, but not declared in the `localeConfig` resource
The language `got (Gothic)` is present in this project, but not declared in the `localeConfig` resource
The language `iw (Hebrew)` is present in this project, but not declared in the `localeConfig` resource

The language `lzh` is present in this project, but not declared in the `localeConfig` resource
The language `my (Burmese)` is present in this project, but not declared in the `localeConfig` resource
The language `nl (Dutch)` is present in this project, but not declared in the `localeConfig` resource
The language `te (Telugu)` is present in this project, but not declared in the `localeConfig` resource
Very long vector path (9610 characters), which is bad for performance. Considering reducing precision, removing minor details or rasterizing vector.
Very long vector path (3543 characters), which is bad for performance. Considering reducing precision, removing minor details or rasterizing vector.
Very long vector path (3295 characters), which is bad for performance. Considering reducing precision, removing minor details or rasterizing vector.
Possible overdraw: Root element paints background `?android:colorBackground` with a theme that also paints a background (inferred theme is `@style/Theme.Kotatsu`)
Possible overdraw: Root element paints background `?android:colorBackground` with a theme that also paints a background (inferred theme is `@style/Theme.Kotatsu`)
Possible overdraw: Root element paints background `?selectableItemBackground` with a theme that also paints a background (inferred theme is `@style/Theme.Kotatsu`)

issue.message: The resource `R.string.manga_error_description_pattern` appears to be unused
issue.errorLine1: <string name="manga_error_description_pattern">Error details:<br><tt>%1$s</tt><br><br>1. Try to <a href="%2$s">open manga in a web browser</a> to ensure it is available on its source<br>2. Make sure you are using the <a href="kotatsu://about">latest version of Kotatsu</a><br>3. If it is available, send an error report to the developers.</string>

issue.errorLine1: <string name="disable_connectivity_check_summary">Bỏ qua kiểm tra kết nối mạng của bạn trong ứng dụng nếu bạn gặp vấn đề với nó (Ví dụ như bạn đã kết nối mạng nhưng ứng dụng nói \"Bạn đang ngoại tuyến\",...)</string>

issue.message: Replace "..." with ellipsis character (…, …) ?
issue.errorLine1: <string name="handle_links_summary">Xử lý các liên kết (Link) truyện từ các ứng dụng bên ngoài (Ví dụ: Chrome,...). Có thể bạn cũng cần phải bật thủ công trong cài đặt hệ thống</string>

issue.message: Replace "..." with ellipsis character (…, …) ?
issue.errorLine1: <string name="disable_captcha_notifications_summary">Bạn sẽ không nhận được thông báo về việc giải CAPTCHA cho nguồn này nhưng điều này cũng có thể dẫn đến việc phá vỡ quá trình hoạt động nền đối với nguồn này (như kiểm tra chương / tập truyện mới, đưa ra gợi ý,...)</string>

issue.message: Replace "..." with ellipsis character (…, …) ?
issue.errorLine1: <string name="disable_captcha_notifications_summary">لن تتلقى إشعارات حول حل CAPTCHA لهذا المصدر ولكن هذا قد يؤدي إلى تعطيل العمليات الخلفية (التحقق من وجود فصول جديدة، الحصول على توصيات، وما إلى ذلك...)</string>

issue.message: Replace "..." with ellipsis character (…, …) ?
issue.errorLine1: <string name="reader_multitask_summary">Tách trình đọc thành 1 tác vụ riêng biệt sẽ cho bạn khả năng mở và đọc nhiều truyện cùng một lúc (tốt hơn với máy tính bảng, Chrome OS và các giả lập Android cho phép mở đa cửa sổ trên máy tính như WSA,...)</string>

issue.message: Use the KTX extension function `Canvas.withSave` instead?
Use the KTX extension function `Context.withStyledAttributes` instead?
Use the KTX extension function `Context.withStyledAttributes` instead?
Use the KTX extension function `Context.withStyledAttributes` instead?
Use the KTX extension function `String.toUri` instead?
Missing `contentDescription` attribute on image
Missing `contentDescription` attribute on image
Missing `contentDescription` attribute on image
Number formatting does not take into account locale settings. Consider using `String.format` instead.
When you define `paddingStart` you should probably also define `paddingEnd` for right-to-left symmetry
When you define `paddingEnd` you should probably also define `paddingStart` for right-to-left symmetry
